title: Pinku's Christmas
description: A vanilla-style christmas texture pack that aims to add a simple but cozy feel to the GUI.
body:
Hii!
This is a simplistic vanilla-style texture pack with a Christmasy theme.
I plan on updating this pack with each new update that comes to the game.

Currently, the pack works for version 1.21.4. If you want more versions then you can find them on my Curseforge and Modrinth page. If you don't see the version that you were looking for then just message me or leave a comment telling me what version you would like and I'll start working on it as soon as I can.

**This texture pack also supports the mods appleskin, modmenu and just enough items.**


I would be happy to hear your feedback so please post them in the comments below. It's very much appreciated, thank you!


I have no idea how this works so if you experience any issues with the pack then let me know, thankss!



**--------------------------[​Terms of use]--------------------------**

You can:
- Use this pack in videos and/or streams.
  - Credit when using it in videos and/or streams is much appreciated.

You can not:
- Claim this pack as your own.
- Modify any textures in this pack.
- Redistribute this pack without my permission.
- Sell this pack for profit.
